places.name: Collectors Treasury
places.description: Over a million items cram the shelves at Africa's largest shop of used and rare books.

places.name: Neighbourgoods Market
places.description: A growing popular hipster market with over 100 local specialties and live music.

places.name: Ponte Tower
places.description: The tallest residential building in Africa is an unsettling Brutalist monolith.

places.name: Museum of Man and Science
places.description: A supply store for traditional healers, this shop sells the hair of a dog--and its skin, skeleton, and reproductive organs, too.

places.name: Satyagraha House
places.description: The home of Mahatma Gandhi during part of the 21 years he spent living in South Africa is now a guest house.

places.name: ‘The Shadow Boxer’ at Chancellor House
places.description: A large-scale steel sculpture entitled 'The Shadow Boxer' pays tribute to Nelson Mandela.
